windows_observation.wsl_query_behavior: wsl --status hung after version output; only the two read-only query processes were terminated

governed_data_move_rehearsal.reason_not_applied: Moving 2.39 GB cannot restore the 75 GiB ingest floor, and the guarded script would roll back on the unrelated current WSL doctor failure.

next_safe_actions: Relocate future dispatcher snapshots and worker worktrees from C: to the governed F: volume before launching more copy-heavy workers.
Preserve all currently sealed/retained worker material until the control-plane owner completes an exact relocation or adoption decision.
Repair or restart the WSL control path only through the existing backup-first guarded recovery procedure; do not detach the in-use VHD or force a new sharing-violation cycle.
Rerun doctor after both capacity and WSL control-path recovery; do not infer CUDA/model failure from the suppressed smokes.
authority_boundary: This is a current fail-closed diagnostic. Historical healthy runtime evidence remains valid only at its observation time, and this record grants no permission to delete preserved snapshots, detach the VHD, or claim P0 exit completion.
